notes:
Two new sources, glass everywhere, and a new face.

- Royal Road: LitRPG and progression fantasy — 1000+ chapter serials load in one shot
- Wattpad: werewolf and fantasy romance
- Stories now searches every novel source at once
- New app icon and splash — a drop landing in its ripples
- Every sheet is now real frosted glass: voice, reader settings, language, sleep timer
- Player rebuilt: glowing waveform, rimmed cover, a scrubber you can grab
- Fixed: Gutenberg listed chapters back to front, so "Chapter 1" opened the last chapter
- Fixed: the Books tab never showed its popular list
